/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libgmock_main.so -o ../lib/libgmock_main.so CMakeFiles/gmock_main.dir/src/gmock_main.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jajayuros1/Documents/RobotInternship2026/RoboticsDevelopWork2026/DataSource/DepthCamera/mo_stereo_camera_driver_v1.4.7_alpha_release_22_11_29/own_sample/build/gtest/lib ../lib/libgmock.so ../lib/libgtest.so -lpthread
